commandsRun: adb -s emulator-5554 shell 'toybox nc -z -w 5 10.0.2.2 3122; echo EXIT:$?'
python helper rerun of the same targeted instrumentation proof while tailing adb logcat and capturing a screenshot as soon as the shipped UI reported CONNECTED

assertions.title: A saved encrypted imported-key identity can be linked to a host, survive relaunch, and reach a real SSH session through the normal trust flow
assertions.reason: On this rerun, the shipped app-shell proof passed end-to-end: the relaunched saved host still referenced the imported-key identity, the targeted UI flow completed through the trust-required connect path, the session state became CONNECTED to 10.0.2.2:3122, and the rerun evidence no longer showed the prior timeout-only failure boundary.

steps.action: Verify the assigned emulator and fixture inputs before running the proof
steps.expected: emulator-5554 is booted, /data/local/tmp/aterm-fixture-client_key_legacy_pem is present, and 10.0.2.2:3122 is reachable from the emulator
steps.observed: sys.boot_completed returned 1, the legacy PEM and public key fixture files were present on-device, and toybox nc returned EXIT:0 for 10.0.2.2:3122.

steps.action: Run SessionSshFixtureInstrumentedTest#imported_key_identity_survives_relaunch_and_reaches_real_terminal_session against the shipped app-shell path
steps.expected: the saved encrypted imported-key identity survives relaunch, the saved host remains linked to it, the normal trust flow is exercised, and the session reaches CONNECTED
steps.observed: The focused connectedDebugAndroidTest run finished green, and the instrumentation proof drove the relaunched Session screen to a connected state for the saved host "Imported key fixture" using the imported-key identity.

steps.action: Inspect rerun logs instead of trusting the test result alone
steps.expected: log output should confirm the shipped UI path reached a live session rather than only a diagnostic probe
steps.observed: logcat recorded "legacy imported-key ui outcome state=CONNECTED status=Connected to 10.0.2.2:3122." and the earlier timeout line did not appear in the rerun evidence set.

steps.action: Capture user-visible evidence from the connected UI state
steps.expected: the Session surface should visibly show a connected state for 10.0.2.2:3122 and the saved host card
steps.observed: The connected-state screenshot shows the Sessions screen with "State: connected", "Connected to 10.0.2.2:3122.", and the saved host card for "Imported key fixture".

evidence.consoleErrors: No app crash, no FATAL EXCEPTION, and no "Connection timed out while reaching 10.0.2.2:3122." line were observed in the rerun assertion logs. Generic adb-shell/uiautomator SELinux and binder warnings appeared only while collecting extra evidence after the successful run.
evidence.network: Fixture reachability from emulator confirmed with toybox nc EXIT:0 to 10.0.2.2:3122; shipped UI outcome logged CONNECTED to 10.0.2.2:3122.

frictions.description: Time-based screenshot attempts at 6s and 10s missed the app and captured the launcher instead of the connected session surface.
frictions.resolution: Reran the same targeted instrumentation proof while streaming adb logcat and triggered the screenshot exactly when the shipped UI logged a CONNECTED outcome.

frictions.description: This assertion had previously required manual log interpretation because the same targeted method once passed while the shipped UI still timed out.
frictions.resolution: Inspected the rerun log output directly and confirmed the shipped UI now reports CONNECTED rather than the earlier timeout message before marking the assertion passed.

summary: VAL-CROSS-001 passed on rerun: the relaunched saved imported-key host/session path reached a real connected Session UI on emulator-5554 against the SSH fixture at 10.0.2.2:3122, with supporting screenshot, logcat, Gradle, and JUnit/HTML artifacts saved under the assigned evidence directory.
